greetings: Hello! Welcome to Cedarville Schools! How can I help you today?
Hi there! I'm here to answer your questions about our programs.
Greetings! Feel free to ask me anything about Cedarville Schools.
responses.hours: Our school hours are Monday to Friday, 7:00 AM - 5:00 PM. The creche program has extended hours until 6:00 PM.
responses.fees:
Our monthly tuition fees are:\
• Creche (6mo-2yrs): ₦50,000\
• Nursery (2-4yrs): ₦45,000\
• Kindergarten (4-6yrs): ₦40,000\
\
We offer flexible payment plans and sibling discounts!
responses.admission:
Our admission process is simple:\
1. Schedule a school tour\
2. Submit application form\
3. Assessment and interview\
4. Enrollment confirmation\
\
Would you like to schedule a tour?
responses.programs:
We offer three main programs:\
• 🍼 Creche: 6 months - 2 years\
• 🧸 Nursery: 2 - 4 years\
• 📚 Kindergarten: 4 - 6 years\
\
Each program is designed to meet the developmental needs of your child.
responses.curriculum: We follow a blended curriculum that combines Nigerian educational standards with international best practices, focusing on play-based learning, STEM activities, and character development.
responses.facilities:
Our facilities include:\
• Spacious, air-conditioned classrooms\
• Outdoor playground\
• Indoor play area\
• Library and reading corner\
• Sick bay with registered nurse\
• CCTV monitoring\
• Nutritious meal service
responses.teachers: All our teachers are certified early childhood educators with minimum 5 years experience. They undergo regular training and background checks.
responses.location: We're located in Aguda, Surulere, Lagos. We're easily accessible and have safe drop-off/pick-up zones.
responses.contact:
You can reach us at:\
📞 +234 803 939 4759\
📧 info@cedarvilleschools.com\
📍 Aguda, Surulere, Lagos
responses.whatsapp: Click here to chat with us on WhatsApp: https://wa.me/2348012345678
responses.tour: I'd be happy to help you schedule a tour! Please call us at +234 803 939 4759 or use the WhatsApp button to arrange a convenient time.
default: I'm not sure how to answer that. Can you ask about our programs, fees, admission process, or facilities?
Let me help you better. You can ask me about school hours, tuition fees, programs, or how to enroll.
I'd be happy to assist! Try asking about our creche, nursery, or kindergarten programs.
